message.content:
@startuml
actor Program
participant "V4L2" as V4L2 #D3E5F8#0179C6 
participant "Bridge CX3" as BridgeCX3 #BDECFB#01A9DB  
participant "Camera OV5640" as CameraOV5640 

== Initialization ==

Program ->> V4L2 : 1 OpenDevice(/dev/video0)
activate V4L2
    activate BridgeCX3
        activate CameraOV5640
        
            deactivate CameraOV5640
            
        deactivate BridgeCX3
    
deactivate V4L2


Program <- - V4L2 : 6 


Program ->> V4L2 : 7 InitDevice()
activate V4L2
    activate BridgeCX3
        activate CameraOV5640
        
            deactivate CameraOV5640
            
        deactivate BridgeCX3    
        
deactivate V4L2



Program <- - V4L2 : 12 



note over Test: value must be equal to ValueA\nvalue must be equal to ValueB\ntest case for SetParameter(value)\nGetParameter()\nStartStream()/StopStream() should work correctly after setting parameters.\nnote right of GetParameter(): returns current parameter values from device driver or camera module depending on which one was called last time before this call; if none were set yet then default ones will returned instead..etc... etc....  

@enduml
